trans-unit.source: This documentation provides instructions on how to set up and use the GoPro cameras for the in field aquisition, including detailed instructions on all necessary steps, checklists for the start and end of data aquisition and tips for troubleshooting.
trans-unit.target: This documentation provides instructions on how to set up and use the GoPro cameras for the in field aquisition, including detailed instructions on all necessary steps, checklists for the start and end of data aquisition and tips for troubleshooting.

trans-unit.source: Before departure, ensure you have the following:
trans-unit.target: Before departure, ensure you have the following:

trans-unit.source: 1. Mount inside the car, **center of windshield** or **behind rearview mirror**
trans-unit.target: 1. Mount inside the car, **center of windshield** or **behind rearview mirror**

trans-unit.source: 2. If needed clean glass before attaching suction mount
trans-unit.target: 2. If needed clean glass before attaching suction mount

trans-unit.source: Attach GoPro with suction mount
trans-unit.target: Attach GoPro with suction mount

trans-unit.source: Make sure locking lever is in UP position
trans-unit.target: Make sure locking lever is in UP position

trans-unit.source: 2. Press the mounts button down with good force
trans-unit.target: 2. Press the mounts button down with good force

trans-unit.source: 3. Flip lock lever down to **secure** the mount
trans-unit.target: 3. Flip lock lever down to **secure** the mount

trans-unit.source: Wiggle the mount to check if it fits tight
trans-unit.target: Wiggle the mount to check if it fits tight

trans-unit.source: 4. Attach GoPro with the clip attachment and thumbscrew to the mount
trans-unit.target: 4. Attach GoPro with the clip attachment and thumbscrew to the mount

trans-unit.source: Make sure Gopro is equipped with clip attachment
trans-unit.target: Make sure Gopro is equipped with clip attachment

trans-unit.source:
Ensure lens faces forward, level with the road
and camera field of view captures the road
trans-unit.target:
Ensure lens faces forward, level with the road
and camera field of view captures the road

trans-unit.source: :::{admonition} Tip for optimal camera alignment :class: tip To fine tune the camera angle for optimal alignment just barely unscrew the screw that connects the GoPro to the clip attachment and slighty adjust the camera angle. To avoid that the camera is tilted to one side make sure that the "GoPro" logo on the suction mount is facing straight up when attaching the suction mount. :::
trans-unit.target: :::{admonition} Tip for optimal camera alignment :class: tip To fine tune the camera angle for optimal alignment just barely unscrew the screw that connects the GoPro to the clip attachment and slighty adjust the camera angle. To avoid that the camera is tilted to one side make sure that the "GoPro" logo on the suction mount is facing straight up when attaching the suction mount. :::

trans-unit.source: Connect GoPro to Powerbank using USB-C cable
trans-unit.target: Connect GoPro to Powerbank using USB-C cable

trans-unit.source: Place Powerbank **securely** (e.g., glove compartment or dash)
trans-unit.target: Place Powerbank **securely** (e.g., glove compartment or dash)

trans-unit.source: Powerback should be stored safely in case of e.g. abrupt breaking
trans-unit.target: Powerback should be stored safely in case of e.g. abrupt breaking

trans-unit.source: Charging symbol should be visible on the top right corner of GoPro screen
trans-unit.target: Charging symbol should be visible on the top right corner of GoPro screen

trans-unit.source: :::{admonition} Using your car's power outlet :class: tip If your car has an appropriate power outlet to connect with the USB-C socket of the camera, you can use it instead the powerbank. Don't forget to unplug after the trip. :::
trans-unit.target: :::{admonition} Using your car's power outlet :class: tip If your car has an appropriate power outlet to connect with the USB-C socket of the camera, you can use it instead the powerbank. Don't forget to unplug after the trip. :::

trans-unit.source: Camera settings can be easilily configured scanning the provide QR code with the GoPro. This is the standard setup. In the case the QR code setup should not work the **manual setup** is described in addition. **If possible always use the QR code setup.**
trans-unit.target: Camera settings can be easilily configured scanning the provide QR code with the GoPro. This is the standard setup. In the case the QR code setup should not work the **manual setup** is described in addition. **If possible always use the QR code setup.**

trans-unit.source: Hold down **Power/Mode** button to turn on the GoPro.
trans-unit.target: Hold down **Power/Mode** button to turn on the GoPro.

trans-unit.source: Scan the following QR code with the Gopro by pointing the lens towards the code
trans-unit.target: Scan the following QR code with the Gopro by pointing the lens towards the code

trans-unit.source: If sucessful a QR_code icon with a red checkmark should pop up
trans-unit.target: If sucessful a QR_code icon with a red checkmark should pop up

trans-unit.source: Check if "AILAS" is displayed in the mode overview in the bottom centre of the screen
trans-unit.target: Check if "AILAS" is displayed in the mode overview in the bottom centre of the screen

trans-unit.source: If the camera already is set in the "AILAS" mode you do not have to configure the settings.
trans-unit.target: If the camera already is set in the "AILAS" mode you do not have to configure the settings.

trans-unit.source: :::{admonition} QR Code Scanning :class: tip If the scanning of the QR code is not working immeadiately try in different lighting conditions or with the camera closer to the code. :::
trans-unit.target: :::{admonition} QR Code Scanning :class: tip If the scanning of the QR code is not working immeadiately try in different lighting conditions or with the camera closer to the code. :::

trans-unit.source: 1. Press the **Mode/Power** button until the screen displays *“Timelapse”* <!-- Icon -->
trans-unit.target: 1. Press the **Mode/Power** button until the screen displays *“Timelapse”* <!-- Icon -->

trans-unit.source:
2.Tap the **settings** icon (bottom right) and configure as follows:
 • **Format**: Photo
 • **Digital Lens**: Wide
 • **Capture**: Interval = 5s
trans-unit.target:
2.Tap the **settings** icon (bottom right) and configure as follows:
 • **Format**: Photo
 • **Digital Lens**: Wide
 • **Capture**: Interval = 5s

trans-unit.source: 3. Tap the **back arrow** to save and return to the main screen.
trans-unit.target: 3. Tap the **back arrow** to save and return to the main screen.

trans-unit.source: in the bottom centre of the scrren should now be displayed: "Time Lapse Photo 5s W"
trans-unit.target: in the bottom centre of the scrren should now be displayed: "Time Lapse Photo 5s W"

trans-unit.source: 1. Tap the **Shutter** button (top button) to begin shooting.
trans-unit.target: 1. Tap the **Shutter** button (top button) to begin shooting.

trans-unit.source: 2. GoPro will now take one photo every 5 seconds.
trans-unit.target: 2. GoPro will now take one photo every 5 seconds.

trans-unit.source: Red blinking every 5 seconds indicates that the camera is shooting
trans-unit.target: Red blinking every 5 seconds indicates that the camera is shooting

trans-unit.source: 3. Tap the **Shutter** button again to stop.
trans-unit.target: 3. Tap the **Shutter** button again to stop.

trans-unit.source: 4. Hold the **Power** button to turn off GoPro at the end of the drive.
trans-unit.target: 4. Hold the **Power** button to turn off GoPro at the end of the drive.

trans-unit.source: The camera will beep a couple of times when turning off
trans-unit.target: The camera will beep a couple of times when turning off

trans-unit.source: Mount the camera on the windshield facing straight ahead.
trans-unit.target: Mount the camera on the windshield facing straight ahead.

trans-unit.source: Connect the Powerbank to the camera with the USB-C cable.
trans-unit.target: Connect the Powerbank to the camera with the USB-C cable.

trans-unit.source: Store the Powerbank somewhere safe so it won’t move while driving.
trans-unit.target: Store the Powerbank somewhere safe so it won’t move while driving.

trans-unit.source: Hold the side power button until the screen turns on.
trans-unit.target: Hold the side power button until the screen turns on.

trans-unit.source: Scan the QR code to configure settings (if not working manual setup)
trans-unit.target: Scan the QR code to configure settings (if not working manual setup)

trans-unit.source: Wait about 1 minute for the camera to pick up GPS signal
trans-unit.target: Wait about 1 minute for the camera to pick up GPS signal

trans-unit.source: Press the top shutter button (big button on top) to start capturing
trans-unit.target: Press the top shutter button (big button on top) to start capturing

trans-unit.source: Is camera level and facing straight ahead?
trans-unit.target: Is camera level and facing straight ahead?

trans-unit.source: Is the GoPro blinking every 5 seconds (taking photos)?
trans-unit.target: Is the GoPro blinking every 5 seconds (taking photos)?

trans-unit.source: Is the Powerbank connected and charging the GoPro?
trans-unit.target: Is the Powerbank connected and charging the GoPro?

trans-unit.source: Is the camera orientation setting correct? If the menu on the camera back screen displays upside down, the setting is incorrect.
trans-unit.target: Is the camera orientation setting correct? If the menu on the camera back screen displays upside down, the setting is incorrect.

trans-unit.source: Press the top shutter button to stop capturing.
trans-unit.target: Press the top shutter button to stop capturing.

trans-unit.source: Hold the power button on the side until the screen turns off.
trans-unit.target: Hold the power button on the side until the screen turns off.

trans-unit.source: Unplug the USB-C cable from the GoPro.
trans-unit.target: Unplug the USB-C cable from the GoPro.

trans-unit.source: Check that the mount is still tight and GoPro is undamaged.
trans-unit.target: Check that the mount is still tight and GoPro is undamaged.

trans-unit.source: Clean the camera lens if dusty or dirty.
trans-unit.target: Clean the camera lens if dusty or dirty.

trans-unit.source: Leave the GoPro securely mounted if safe, or store it in its case or bag.
trans-unit.target: Leave the GoPro securely mounted if safe, or store it in its case or bag.

trans-unit.source: Plug the Powerbank into a wall socket to charge overnight.
trans-unit.target: Plug the Powerbank into a wall socket to charge overnight.

trans-unit.source: The mount fell off and can't be reinstalled
trans-unit.target: The mount fell off and can't be reinstalled

trans-unit.source: Check battery level or connect Powerbank
trans-unit.target: Check battery level or connect Powerbank

trans-unit.source: Ensure "AILAS" mode is active and Shutter is pressed
trans-unit.target: Ensure "AILAS" mode is active and Shutter is pressed

trans-unit.source: Check cable connection; try another USB port
trans-unit.target: Check cable connection; try another USB port

trans-unit.source: Clean glass and remount (in different spot)
trans-unit.target: Clean glass and remount (in different spot)

trans-unit.source: Turn off for 5 mins in shade, then resume
trans-unit.target: Turn off for 5 mins in shade, then resume

trans-unit.source: Use alternatice code or perform manual configuarion
trans-unit.target: Use alternatice code or perform manual configuarion

trans-unit.source: If the menu is displayed upside down on the camera screen as in the following image, the images themselves will also be saved with the wrong orientation.
trans-unit.target: If the menu is displayed upside down on the camera screen as in the following image, the images themselves will also be saved with the wrong orientation.

trans-unit.source: Do the following to fix this before starting to record:
trans-unit.target: Do the following to fix this before starting to record:

trans-unit.source: Swipe down from the top of the screen to open the settings menu.
trans-unit.target: Swipe down from the top of the screen to open the settings menu.

trans-unit.source: Scan the QR code again to make sure that no other settings were changed by accident.
trans-unit.target: Scan the QR code again to make sure that no other settings were changed by accident.

trans-unit.source: If anything goes wrong or you're unsure, don't hesitate to contact:
trans-unit.target: If anything goes wrong or you're unsure, don't hesitate to contact:
